title: Amazon Neptune DB Cluster
description: Represents an Amazon Neptune DB cluster, which is a managed graph database cluster with one writer instance and up to 15 read replica instances sharing a distributed storage volume.

DBClusterIdentifier.description: The user-supplied unique identifier for the DB cluster. Must contain 1-63 alphanumeric characters or hyphens, start with a letter, and not end with a hyphen.

DBClusterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the DB cluster.

Status.description: The current state of the DB cluster.

Engine.description: The name of the database engine (always 'neptune').

EngineVersion.description: The version of the Neptune database engine.

Endpoint.description: The DNS address of the primary instance of the DB cluster. This is the read/write cluster endpoint.

ReaderEndpoint.description: The reader endpoint for the DB cluster. Used to distribute read-only connections across read replicas.

Port.description: The port that the DB cluster listens on.

DBClusterParameterGroup.description: The name of the DB cluster parameter group associated with the cluster.

DBSubnetGroup.description: The name of the DB subnet group associated with the cluster.

AllocatedStorage.description: The allocated storage size in gibibytes (GiB).

ClusterCreateTime.description: The time when the DB cluster was created, in UTC.

PreferredBackupWindow.description: The daily time range during which automated backups are created (UTC), in the format hh24:mi-hh24:mi.

PreferredMaintenanceWindow.description: The weekly time range during which system maintenance can occur (UTC), in the format ddd:hh24:mi-ddd:hh24:mi.

BackupRetentionPeriod.description: The number of days for which automated backups are retained.

MultiAZ.description: Whether the DB cluster has instances in multiple Availability Zones.

StorageEncrypted.description: Whether the DB cluster storage is encrypted at rest.

KmsKeyId.description: The AWS KMS key identifier used for encrypting the cluster storage.

DeletionProtection.description: Whether deletion protection is enabled. When enabled, the cluster cannot be deleted.

IAMDatabaseAuthenticationEnabled.description: Whether AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) database authentication is enabled.

DBClusterMembers.description: The list of DB instances that are members of this cluster.

VpcSecurityGroups.description: The VPC security groups associated with the cluster.

AssociatedRoles.description: IAM roles that are associated with the DB cluster for accessing other AWS services.

AvailabilityZones.description: The Availability Zones in which instances in the cluster can be created.

CopyTagsToSnapshot.description: Whether tags are copied to snapshots of the DB cluster.

CrossAccountClone.description: Whether the cluster can be cloned across accounts.

ServerlessV2ScalingConfiguration.description: The scaling configuration for Neptune Serverless.

MinCapacity.description: The minimum number of Neptune capacity units (NCUs).

MaxCapacity.description: The maximum number of Neptune capacity units (NCUs).

DBClusterMember.description: A DB instance that is a member of a Neptune DB cluster.

DBInstanceIdentifier.description: The instance identifier for this member.

IsClusterWriter.description: Whether this instance is the primary (writer) instance of the cluster.

DBClusterParameterGroupStatus.description: The status of the DB cluster parameter group for this member.

PromotionTier.description: The failover priority order. Lower values have higher priority.

DBClusterRole.description: An IAM role associated with a Neptune DB cluster.

RoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role.

Status.description: The status of the association between the IAM role and the cluster.

FeatureName.description: The name of the feature associated with the role.
